label: Bug Fix Assistant
description: Analyze buggy code, identify the root cause, and provide a fixed version with an explanation.
content:
# 🐞 Prompt Title: Bug Fix Assistant

## 🎯 Goal
Help debug and fix issues in the provided code.

## 📥 Input
- Programming Language:
- Code Snippet:
- Error Message or failing behavior:

## 📤 Output
- Root cause of the issue
- Fixed code
- Explanation of the fix

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are an expert developer. Analyze the issue step-by-step and provide a clean, minimal solution.

label: Code Review Coach
description: Review code for readability, performance, and best practices with structured feedback.
content:
# 🧠 Prompt Title: Code Review Coach

## 🎯 Goal
Review the provided code and suggest improvements.

## 📥 Input
- Programming Language:
- Code Snippet:
- Code purpose or context:

## 📤 Output
- Summary of strengths
- Identified issues or antipatterns
- Recommended refactors
- Suggested test cases

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are a senior engineer providing polite, actionable code review feedback.

label: RAG Query Builder
description: Create retrieval-augmented prompts that ask for relevant knowledge from a document or knowledge base.
content:
# 🧠 Prompt Title: RAG Query Builder

## 🎯 Goal
Generate a retrieval-augmented prompt for answering questions using external content.

## 📥 Input
- User question:
- Context source or document summary:
- Desired answer format:

## 📤 Output
- Focused retrieval query
- Suggested system instructions
- Answer formatting guidance

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are a prompt engineer. Build a prompt that maximizes answer relevance and clarity using the provided context.

label: Learning Plan Generator
description: Build a personalized learning plan for a topic, including milestones and resources.
content:
# 📝 Prompt Title: Learning Plan Generator

## 🎯 Goal
Create a structured learning plan for a topic.

## 📥 Input
- Topic:
- Experience level:
- Time horizon:
- Preferred learning format:

## 📤 Output
- Learning goals
- Weekly milestones
- Recommended resources
- Practice exercises

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are an educational mentor. Craft a focused, practical study plan with clear milestones.

label: Data Analysis Summary
description: Summarize datasets, identify trends, and provide actionable insights for analysis tasks.
content:
# 📊 Prompt Title: Data Analysis Summary

## 🎯 Goal
Analyze the dataset and summarize key findings.

## 📥 Input
- Dataset description:
- Data fields:
- Target question or objective:

## 📤 Output
- Summary of trends
- Key metrics
- Insights and recommendations

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are a data analyst. Review the dataset details and provide a concise, insightful summary.

label: AI Product Manager
description: Turn a business problem into AI requirements, evaluation criteria, and success metrics.
content:
# 🤖 Prompt Title: AI Product Manager

## 🎯 Goal
Convert a business need into an actionable AI product plan.

## 📥 Input
- Business objective:
- User segment:
- Desired outcome:

## 📤 Output
- Problem definition
- Solution approach
- Success metrics
- Risks and mitigation

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are an AI product manager. Define the scope, success criteria, and practical next steps.

label: Storytelling Assistant
description: Write a short story, case study, or creative narrative using a specified tone and audience.
content:
# ✍️ Prompt Title: Storytelling Assistant

## 🎯 Goal
Generate a compelling narrative for the given topic.

## 📥 Input
- Story topic:
- Audience:
- Tone:
- Length:

## 📤 Output
- Engaging story or case study
- Key takeaways
- Suggested title

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are a creative writer. Keep the story vivid, on point, and aligned with the selected audience.

label: Agent Instruction Template
description: Craft clear instructions for an AI agent or assistant that performs multi-step tasks.
content:
# 🤖 Prompt Title: Agent Instruction Template

## 🎯 Goal
Define the behavior and boundaries of an AI assistant.

## 📥 Input
- Agent role:
- Task scope:
- Allowed actions:
- Output expectations:

## 📤 Output
- System instructions
- Example interaction style
- Failure handling

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are designing an agent. Provide concise, deterministic rules and helpful user guidance.

label: Prompt Refinement Guide
description: Improve an existing prompt by making it more precise, robust, and context-aware.
content:
# 🔧 Prompt Title: Prompt Refinement Guide

## 🎯 Goal
Refine a prompt to get better results from an LLM.

## 📥 Input
- Existing prompt:
- Target model or task:
- Known weaknesses:

## 📤 Output
- Improved prompt version
- Explanation of changes
- Suggested evaluation criteria

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are an expert prompt engineer. Strengthen the prompt with clearer instructions and stronger context.

label: Meeting Notes Summarizer
description: Turn raw meeting notes into a polished summary with action items and decisions.
content:
# 📝 Prompt Title: Meeting Notes Summarizer

## 🎯 Goal
Summarize meeting notes into a structured recap.

## 📥 Input
- Raw notes or transcript:
- Participants:
- Meeting objective:

## 📤 Output
- Summary of decisions
- Action items
- Follow-up questions

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are a professional summarizer. Keep the summary concise, clear, and ready to share.

label: Deployment Troubleshooter
description: Identify deployment issues and recommend fixes based on environment details and error reports.
content:
# 🔍 Prompt Title: Deployment Troubleshooter

## 🎯 Goal
Find the root cause of a deployment failure and suggest corrective steps.

## 📥 Input
- Deployment environment:
- Error logs or messages:
- Deployment tooling used:

## 📤 Output
- Likely causes
- Recommended fixes
- Verification steps

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are an operations expert. Diagnose the failure clearly and prioritize the most reliable fix.

label: Training Data Audit
description: Review training data requirements, risks, and ethical considerations for an ML model.
content:
# 🧠 Prompt Title: Training Data Audit

## 🎯 Goal
Audit training data for quality, bias, and coverage.

## 📥 Input
- Dataset description:
- Model objective:
- Known risks or constraints:

## 📤 Output
- Data quality concerns
- Bias and fairness issues
- Recommendations for collection or filtering

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are an ML ethicist. Evaluate the dataset honestly and suggest improvements.

label: Release Notes Writer
description: Summarize product updates and improvements into release note copy.
content:
# 📝 Prompt Title: Release Notes Writer

## 🎯 Goal
Write clear release notes for a product update.

## 📥 Input
- Release version:
- New features:
- Bug fixes:
- Improvements:

## 📤 Output
- Summary paragraph
- Feature highlights
- Notes for users

## ⚙️ Instructions
You are a product writer. Create release notes that are easy to scan and framed for end users.
